title: Planet Labs PBC Stock Performance and Earnings Growth - Fiscal 2026
text:
Planet Labs achieved record financial performance in fiscal 2026 with revenue reaching $307.7 million, representing 26% year-over-year growth. The company's Q4 revenue of $86.8 million exceeded analyst expectations by 11.55%, demonstrating consistent execution and market strength. The milestone of achieving first full year non-GAAP profitability with $15.5 million adjusted EBITDA marks a critical inflection point.

Free cash flow surged to $52.9 million in fiscal 2026 from negative $64 million in the prior year, validating the sustainability of the company's profitability transition. Non-GAAP gross margins of 59% support the view that Planet Labs has achieved operating leverage. The company's cash position of $640.1 million provides substantial capital for growth investments.

Planet Labs' backlog of $900 million represents approximately three years of revenues at current run-rates, providing exceptional visibility. Approximately 85% of revenue comes from annual or multi-year contracts, with more than 90% from recurring subscriptions. This recurring revenue model reduces execution risk and provides predictable cash generation.

The Defense & Intelligence segment shows the strongest growth with over 50% year-over-year expansion. Major contracts with Sweden, Germany, Greece, and other nations validate the company's appeal to international defense agencies. Fiscal 2027 guidance of $415-440 million revenue (35-43% growth) reflects management confidence in sustained expansion.

Analyst consensus maintains Buy ratings with average price targets around $35. The combination of strong backlog, improving profitability, and robust defense demand supports positive analyst sentiment. Investors appreciate the company's transformation from pre-profitability venture to profitable growth company with substantial market opportunity.
